title: Merge Batch Manifest
description: Schema for controlled auto-merge batch manifests. Records PR allowlist, per-PR outcomes, pre/post commit SHAs, and health gate results.

batchId.description: Unique identifier for the merge batch (e.g. merge-batch-20260511-173000)

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the batch run

mode.description: Whether the batch was a dry-run or executed

prs.description: Explicit list of PRs processed in this batch

preCommit.description: Git HEAD commit SHA before merges (null in dry-run or on pre-merge failure)

postCommit.description: Git HEAD commit SHA after merges (null when batch does not complete)

postHealthCommand.description: Health command path (null when -RunHealthGate not used)

blockedPrs.description: PRs that were blocked before merge (guard or eligibility failures)

failureReason.description: Top-level failure reason when the entire batch aborts (e.g. guard failure, eligibility check)

status.description: Outcome of this PR in the batch

failureReason.description: Detail on why this PR failed (present when status is 'failed')

reason.description: Why the PR was blocked (guard violation, eligibility failure, etc.)
